media.title:
Seats filling fast for our next long lunch. 4 courses, $69pp Sunday 28th September. 

Think oysters, scallop crudo, mussels, market fish plus something sweet to finish. 

Bookings via obee

The Oak Annual Truffle Lunch. 
Sunday 10th August.
4 courses featuring fresh black truffles from the Barrington Tops, curated by @josh_cale_nicholson (ex Rockpool, Albert st Food & Wine, Bannisters Port Stephens)
$69pp

Bookings very limited and filling fast. 
https://obee.com.au/theoaktigheshill/

BASTILLE DAY LUNCH 

Brought to you by the Oaks favourite Frenchman
A four course set menu with the option to add local truffle and/or perfectly paired wine if you're feeling fancy 

Live music by @thehighandies 

Tables available from 1pm, book through the link in our bio

Following on from our fantastic record fair in May. The Oak Tighes Hill presents a casual record swap//meet.

Come along and checkout curated vendors, DJâs and enjoy a couple of cold beers.

The swap//meet offers punters a venue to come together and talk all things vinyl with like minded individuals. Also offering a space for people to trade records between themselves whilst enjoying some Grade A DJs in the front bar and beer garden.

Kamahl Amnesty bin - Bring along any Kamahl records you may be stuck with and weâll buy them off you for credit to use on food and beverage. $1 credit/ Kamahl record.

The Oak Truffle Dinner | Wed 24th July 

Bookings available from 6 pm onwards. 

âAn obscene amount of truffle for the moneyâ 

4 Courses, $65 per person and wine matching available. 

Hosted by Big Josh Nicholson - 

Ex- Rockpool Bar and Grill (2 Hat), Hero @ ACMI (1 Hat), 
Albert Street Food and Wine (1 Hat) and Rick Stein Port Stephens

â¨ð¥ Mother's Day at the Oak ð¥â¨

Join us Sun 12th May and celebrate your mama! 
Enjoy a 3-course set-menu for $49 and welcome bubbles for mum.

$49 menu as follows:

- Stella Maris oysters with champagne mignonette
- Porchetta with white beans and cavolo nero
- Poached pear frangipane tart with chantilly cream

The High Andies will be playing 2 pm - 4 pm, and Happy Hour with $5.50 domestic schooners from 4 pm - 6 pm. 

Book here - https://bookings.obeeapp.com/theoaktigheshill
